item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 7s Krzysztof Ratajski has come through a tricky tie against Mike De Decker that was marred by missed
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 7s Krzysztof Ratajski has come through a tricky tie against Mike De Decker that was marred by missed doubles.
The Polish Eagle will face either No.1 seed Gian van Veen or Joe Cullen as he hunts his first Euro Tour title since 2023.
In association with @DiamondXDraws
#Darts

item.title:

A second century of the match already for the Mighty Mouse
item.description:

item.title: PDCResults: PDCResults @PDCResults · 2min Traducido del polaco Mostrar original (R): European Tour 5 - Gran Premio Europeo de Dardos
item.description: PDCResults @PDCResults · 2min Traducido del polaco Mostrar original (R): European Tour 5 - Gran Premio Europeo de Dardos 2026, Últimos 32, Mike De Decker (87.09) 4 (11) 6 (93.30) Krzysztof Ratajski 31

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min There's so much listening already for you on @RadioSnooker from this World Champio
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min There's so much listening already for you on @RadioSnooker from this World Championship.
If you missed it, here's Shaun Murphy telling me he doesn't think the Champions Dinner will continue if more players don't show up.
https:// open.spotify.com/episode/3cDftq qaideaKUUAYjZSOK …
#RadioSnooker open.spotify.com LIVE FROM 2026 WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP - Shaun Murphy: Champions Dinner won't continue if more players... Radio Snooker with Nick Metcalfe · Episode 30
